name: Fields that Merchandising Cloud reads from Shopify
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "There are 4 sources of data that Merchandising Cloud can read from Shopify to use as a filter/field: Default fields, Variant Options, Tags-Based Fields and Shopify Product Metafields."}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Default Fields"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Merchandising Cloud loads a few fields from Shopify out of the box since they are marked as required in our system. Here is the list of these fields:"}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "th", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Name in Merchandising Cloud"}]}]}, {"type": "th", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Name in Shopify"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "SKU"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "SKU of the variant"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Title"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Title of the product"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Description of the product"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Price"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Price of the variants"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Category"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product Type"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Brand"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product Vendor"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Barcode"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Barcode of the variant"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Image_URL"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Images of the Product"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Tags"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product Tags"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Quantity"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "attributes": {"rowspan": "1", "colspan": "1"}, "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Quantities of the variants (based on selected inventory locations)"}]}]}]}], "id": "table-0-3", "colSizes": [300, 300]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Variant Options"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "All variant options that are set in Shopify will be loaded to Merchandising Cloud on the variant level, i.e. Color, Size, Material, etc."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "
Variant Options can be used to create custom filters: all you need to do is to populare the variants with Variant Options in Shopify and the custom field will be loaded by Merchandising Cloud."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Tags-Based Custom Fields"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Steps to Add a New Tags-Based Filter:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Configure a tag so Merchandising Cloud can read it"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Create a filter on Merchant Dashboard"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product Sync"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Edit the Filters"}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 1: Configure a tag so Merchandising Cloud can read it"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "If you wish to add information to the tag, you need to prefix this information with a common word. For instance, if you wish to add the "gender" information to a T-Shirt product, valid values would be:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "gender:Male"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "gender:Female"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "gender:Mixed"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "gender:another value"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 2: Create a filter on Merchant Dashboard"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After configuring the tags, you would need to go to our dashboard -> Setup -> Filtering, and click on 'Create Filter' button:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": "", "code": true}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/bd3aff6-create_filter.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/bd3aff6-create_filter.png", "name": "", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "resizemode": "stretchy-fit", "source": "external"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In the popup window, you would need to provide the prefix used in the tag setup, i.e. gender:, and the field name:"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": "", "code": true}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/ed8ba71-filter_setup.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/ed8ba71-filter_setup.png", "name": "", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "resizemode": "stretchy-fit", "source": "external"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 3: Product Sync"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "After you complete the filter setup, you would need to perform a product sync, go to our "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://dashboard.findify.io/settings/product-sync", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Merchant Dashboard"}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": "", "code": true}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/1693456-Product_sync.gif", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/1693456-Product_sync.gif", "name": "", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "resizemode": "stretchy-fit", "source": "external"}}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Step 4: Edit the Filters"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Once synced, you will be able to enable/disable and change the order of the filters in our "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://dashboard.findify.io/setup/filters", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Merchant Dashboard"}]}, {"text": ""}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "children": [{"text": "", "code": true}], "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://files.readme.io/fce83de-filters.png", "embedData": {"url": "https://files.readme.io/fce83de-filters.png", "name": "", "embedType": "image", "float": "none", "resizemode": "stretchy-fit", "source": "external"}}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "📘 Variant Options or Tags?
"}]}, {"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "If a product has several variants and you wish to associate the filter at the variant level, then it makes more sense to add an "}, {"text": "option", "italic": true}, {"text": ".
For instance, if you have 3 T-Shirts available in the colors "blue", "green" and "red", you will have to create 3 options "red", "blue" and "green". Here, you characterize the variant and associate the information at the variant level.
"}]}, {"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "On the other side, if you wish to add a filter on the product level (in case there are no options or if the filter applies to all options), then it makes more sense to add a "}, {"text": "tag", "italic": true}, {"text": " associated with the product."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h1", "children": [{"text": "Product Metafields"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Merchandising Cloud has a feature to download product/variant metafields from Shopify.

Please, contact our support at "}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost.com"}]}, {"text": " if you need to setup the metafields job."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "
"}]}]
